# dokploy_organization (Data Source)

A Dokploy organization. If the API key can see more than one organization, set `name` to select one.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# The organization the configured API key belongs to.
data "dokploy_organization" "current" {}

output "organization_name" {
  value = data.dokploy_organization.current.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Organization name. Optional when the API key sees exactly one organization; required to disambiguate when it sees several.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Organization identifier.
- `slug` (String) Organization slug (may be empty).
